moveBetweenLocators.reason: Storage Bin Move process button — not applicable to simplified UI

project.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

costCenter.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

asset.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

activity.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

salesCampaign.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

stDimension.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

ndDimension.reason: Accounting dimension — not relevant for simplified inventory movements

storageBin.reason: Source storage bin — key field for movement lines

newStorageBin.reason: Destination storage bin — key field for movement lines

attributeSetValue.reason: Attribute set values are complex and rarely needed in simplified UI

operativeQuantity.reason: Alternative UOM quantity — advanced feature, not needed for initial version

alternativeUOM.reason: Alternative UOM selector — advanced feature, not needed for initial version

orderUOM.reason: Second UOM for product — advanced feature, not needed for initial version

orderQuantity.reason: Second UOM quantity — advanced feature, not needed for initial version

stockReservation.reason: Stock reservation link — advanced feature, not needed for initial version

mAttributeSetInstanceToID.reason: New attribute set instance — advanced feature, not needed for initial version

SL_Movement_Conversion_QuantityOrder.description: UOM conversion callout triggered on QuantityOrder. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Movement_Conversion_QuantityOrder.impactIfOmitted: UOM conversion not auto-calculated; backend handles on save.

SL_Movement_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id.description: UOM conversion callout triggered on Order UOM change. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Movement_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id.impactIfOmitted: UOM conversion not auto-calculated; backend handles on save.

SL_Movement_Product.description: Auto-fill UOM and storage bin from product selection. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Movement_Product.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set UOM after selecting product. Backend fills UOM on save.

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum.description: Convert operative quantity to base quantity when AUM changes. Source not found — classic UI only.
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum.impactIfOmitted: No auto-conversion between UOMs; backend handles conversion on save.

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty.description: Convert operative quantity to base quantity when operative qty changes. Source not found — classic UI only.
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty.impactIfOmitted: No auto-conversion between UOMs; backend handles conversion on save.

AD_Org show child organizations.description: Filters organization selector to child organizations in the hierarchy.
AD_Org show child organizations.impactIfOmitted: Users could select organizations outside their accessible tree.

Available UOM's for Product for Logistic.description: Filters AUM selector to UOMs valid for the product in logistics flow.
Available UOM's for Product for Logistic.impactIfOmitted: AUM field is discarded in simplified UI, so not needed.

READONLY_Processed_Header.description: Header fields (movementDate, description) become read-only when document is processed (Processed=Y).
READONLY_Processed_Header.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit fields on completed movements, breaking data integrity.

READONLY_Processed_Lines.description: Line fields (product, locator, quantity, lineNo) become read-only when document is processed.
READONLY_Processed_Lines.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit lines on completed movements.

PROCESS_ProcessMovements.description: Process Movements button (Processing). Confirms and processes the inventory movement.
PROCESS_ProcessMovements.impactIfOmitted: Users cannot confirm movements from the UI.

PROCESS_MoveStorageBin.description: Move a Storage Bin process button. Bulk move between locators — discarded from simplified UI.
PROCESS_MoveStorageBin.impactIfOmitted: Users move products line by line; no bulk locator swap.

PROCESS_Posted.description: Posted hardcoded button. Not applicable to simplified UI.
